summary: Three projects are stalled (HBH, Scheduler, YaA) and three are at-risk (BR, YaC, YaB); zero are healthy. The products are mostly fine: the per-project top findings repeat 'code is healthy, process-stalled not product-dead.' What has seized is the automation harness. Audits and bar-raises run every morning but nothing lands: the installed personal-skills plugin lacks the enqueue phases, HBH is not mounted, the YaE git-index is corrupt, and the four-hourly drain is forbidden from shell and release ops. Six repos accumulate untracked reports a single git checkout would erase. The fix is an executor, not more analysis.

topActions.label: Reinstall personal-skills plugin so installed audit/handler skills regain their enqueue phases; root cause of the broken loop across all six projects.
Make write-dashboard-status.ps1 merge-aware so releases stop nulling the barRaise block (YaC, Scheduler, YaA).
Drain the four uncommitted working trees (BR v0.39.0, YaB F1-F11, Scheduler, YaA) before a git checkout erases them.
Mount HBH into the audit/drain session; blocks every stalled HBH item and both correctness HIGHs.
P0: git-tracked live Discord webhook in scripts/.discord_webhook.txt; gitignore, rm --cached, rotate.
fog_of_war.gd and save_load.gd reference deleted pre-rename filenames: wrong fog radius and dropped buildings on load.
Banned AI-tool name live in GDD.html:2637 and CHANGELOG.md:554/617; dead Lantern Oil fail-path. Ship in v0.39.0.
index.html:1490 HBH card contradicts far-colony canonical; version pills stale on 5 of 6 cards.
P0: git-index corruption blocking the queue drain; rebuild the index.
Daily bar-raise on stalled repos burns token budget re-printing identical lists; gate on HEAD-moved or pause.
